parameters.text:
=Create minimal pytest tests for this feature.

The User Story scope is minimal and atomic.
Never expand the scope.

Title:
{{ $json.title }}

Description:
{{ $json.description }}

Acceptance Criteria:
{{ $json.acceptance_criteria }}

Technical Design:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.technical_design) }}

Forbidden:
- estimate_calories unless explicitly present
- summarize_meal unless explicitly present
- meal objects unless explicitly present
- ingredients unless explicitly present
- calories unless explicitly present

Allowed:
- Only functions explicitly present in acceptance criteria

Critical rule:
The acceptance criteria are the source of truth.

If acceptance criteria mention:
calculate_total_macros(protein, carbs, fat)

Then generate tests ONLY for:
calculate_total_macros(protein, carbs, fat)

Do not generate summarize_meal, estimate_calories, sample foods, ingredients, meal objects, APIs, databases, fixtures, or mocks unless explicitly present in the acceptance criteria.
When expected numerical results are generated, they must be mathematically consistent with the acceptance criteria and input values.
Do not invent expected values that contradict the formula.
If the User Story does not explicitly define a formula, generate only simple input/output tests directly implied by the acceptance criteria.

Return this exact JSON structure:

{
  "tdd_test_design": {
    "test_strategy_summary": "Minimal pytest coverage.",
    "unit_tests": [],
    "integration_tests": ["No integration tests required"],
    "api_tests": ["No API tests required"],
    "edge_cases": [],
    "failure_scenarios": [],
    "acceptance_coverage_matrix": [],
    "pytest_files": [],
    "fixtures": ["No fixtures required"],
    "mocking_strategy": ["No mocks required"],
    "test_execution_commands": ["pytest tests"],
    "quality_risks": ["No major quality risk"]
  },
  "quality_gate": {
    "passed": true,
    "blocking_issues": [],
    "recommendation": "CONTINUE"
  },
  "next_workflow": "WF04"
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a strict pytest test designer.

You must derive tests ONLY from the User Story acceptance criteria.

Forbidden:
- Do not invent meal objects.
- Do not invent ingredients.
- Do not invent sample foods.
- Do not invent calories.
- Do not invent summarize_meal.
- Do not invent functions not explicitly present in acceptance criteria.
- Do not expand scope beyond the current User Story.

Allowed:
- Use only function names explicitly present in the User Story.
- Use only inputs implied by the User Story.
- Generate minimal pytest unit tests.
- Keep quality_gate.passed true if the User Story is testable.

Return ONLY valid JSON.
No markdown.
No explanations.
No comments.
Output must be parseable by JSON.parse().
